title: Required columns missing in CRM, but available in Work Management
excerpt:
Description
Currently, the required column feature is available in Work Management boards but is not present in CRM boards. This creates inconsistencies in workflows where we need mandatory fields when adding or updating…

posts.author: Peter_Deviniti.com (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the required column feature is available in Work Management boards but is not present in CRM boards. This creates inconsistencies in workflows where we need mandatory fields when adding or updating CRM items. It would be very helpful to have required columns supported in monday CRM as well.

What are you trying to achieve

I aim to achieve consistency between Work Management and CRM. I would like the required column feature to be available in CRM boards so that mandatory fields can be enforced for consistent data input

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Peter_Deviniti.com if you are open to marketplace apps, the Workflow app by spot-nik lets you set required columns per step and works in Work Management as well. You also get Conditions, Permissions per step and a Visual flow builder. You can give it a try: https://spot-nik.com/how-to-use-workflow/ and you can add it here: Workflow - monday.com Marketplace
